settings.heading: Buy more, pay less — published tiers.
settings.subhead: We don't haggle. Our tier discounts apply automatically at cart. The deeper you buy, the more you save.

settings.heading: Pricing for thermal shipping labels (ED-TL-4X6-1K)
settings.body: Indicative tiers. Final per-SKU pricing on each PDP.
settings.footnote: All prices include 18% GST. Free shipping on orders above ₹2,500.

settings.heading: Pay 30 days after invoice.
settings.body: For verified businesses doing more than ₹2L/month with us. Apply via the quote form — KYC takes 3 business days.

settings.heading: Free sample pack — pick 3 SKUs.
settings.body: Ships in 2 business days. No charge.

settings.question: Do tier discounts apply automatically?
settings.answer: Yes — at cart. No code needed. The price you see on the PDP at a given quantity is what you'll pay.

settings.question: Can I mix SKUs across cases?
settings.answer: Not within a single case-pricing tier. But you can combine multiple SKUs in one order — each SKU's tier price applies independently.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: Prepaid: UPI, NEFT, RTGS, credit/debit cards. Postpaid: NET-30 for approved accounts only.

settings.question: Do you offer refunds on bulk orders?
settings.answer: Manufacturing defects only — full replacement at our cost. Unopened, undamaged cases can be returned within 7 days; restocking fee 10%.
